states.name: declared
states.description: Scoped Facility Instance is defined but not available for dispatch.
entry_requirements: Facility Revision, scope and policy bindings are recorded.

states.name: activating
states.description: Provider bindings and required policies are being materialized/verified.
entry_requirements: Activation Activity and intended Provider bindings are recorded.

states.name: active
states.description: Facility Instance may be considered for dispatch when current Provider readiness/capability evidence also passes.
entry_requirements: At least one compatible Provider binding and activation Receipt exist.

states.name: suspended
states.description: New dispatch is disabled while identity/history remain active.
entry_requirements: Suspension reason and authority are retained.

states.name: deactivating
states.description: Instance is draining/removing bindings and no new ordinary dispatch is allowed.
entry_requirements: Deactivation and active-work handling policy are recorded.

states.name: inactive
states.description: Facility Instance remains retained but has no active dispatch authority.
entry_requirements: Provider bindings and active work are reconciled.

states.name: failed
states.description: Lifecycle materialization failed; this does not itself describe every Provider or capability state.
entry_requirements: Failure Receipt and reconciliation requirements are retained.

states.name: retired
states.description: Facility Instance cannot be reactivated; history remains retained.
entry_requirements: Retirement authority and cleanup/retention evidence are recorded.

required_preconditions: Facility Revision, scope and policy are valid.
Compatible Provider binding plan and authorization are recorded.
Provider binding exists and current activation evidence passes; readiness remains a separate observation.
New dispatch is blocked and existing work is handled by policy.
No-new-dispatch rule and active-work cleanup are recorded.
Provider bindings and active work are reconciled.
Failure source, generation and uncertainty/cleanup requirements are retained.
No active binding/lease remains and retention policy is recorded.
